title: Still Waiting GIF by Pokémon
SpongeBob gif. A title card background reads "Two hours later..." in the show's signature font.
Movie gif. Ted Knight as Judge Smails in Caddyshack stands in a crowd and screams at someone offscreen, punctuating every syllable with a lot of sass. Text, "Well, We're Waiting."
Sesame Street gif. Big Bird sitting on the stoop, tapping his feet and wing, waiting.
Disney gif. Animated Alice in Wonderland rests her arms on a table and her head in her palm, tapping her fingers methodically on her face and staring into the distance. She's bored AF.
Cat Waiting GIF
TV gif. Trevor Noah holds his bunched fists under his chin in excitement and says "The suspense is killing me!"
Movie gif. Ted Knight as Judge Elihu Smails in Caddyshack stands among a crowd looking smug and impatient, saying, "well, we're waiting."

Meme gif. Rowan Atkinson as Mr. Bean standing in an empty field, hands on his hips, looking at his watch, then sitting crossed legged picking at flowers, then standing doing nothing, then lying flat. Text, "Still waiting..."
Meme gif. Gloria Stuart as Rose on Titanic with her eyes closed and solemn, saying, "It's been 84 years..."
TV gif. Zach Woods as Jared in Silicon Valley looks out an open window, pulling aside big vertical blinds. He looks devastated and utterly defeated.
Wait Waiting GIF
Movie gif. Rowan Atkinson as Mr. Bean in Mr. Bean's Holiday, stands in a field of yellow flowers on a windy day. He looks off into the distance and then at his watch, before scratching his head.
Meme gif. Rowan Atkinson as Mr. Bean standing in an empty field, hands on his hips, looking at his watch and scratching his head.
SpongeBob gif. Spongebob sits behind a desk as his wide round eyes blink slowly as if he were waiting patiently.

Digital art gif. A skeleton sits at a table, leaning on its elbow, waiting.
Cartoon gif. Sylvester the Cat from Looney Tunes paces back and forth in a room with his hands tucked behind his back.

TV gif. In a black and white scene, George McFarland as Spanky from The Little Rascals holds his head in one hand and drums restlessly on a desk with the other.
Bored Whats Going On GIF by Ponke
Celebrity gif. We zoom on Justin Timberlake as he tilts his head with an impatient stare. Text, "Still waiting."

Digital illustration gif. We slow pan towards the top half of what looks like a science class skeleton sitting awkwardly upright in a grassy field, eyeballs filled in with white irises and black pupils looking straight at us, a broad grin and full set of teeth stretching across its face. Text appears with the question, "Well? Where you at?'
The Office gif. Leslie David Baker as Stanley Hudson looks pointedly across the room, his arms folded over his chest in a way that says, "I'm over this." Text: Still waiting.
Meme gif. Sad Pablo Escobar, Wagner Moura as Pablo Escobar on Narcos, sitting on a suburban swing, hands in his lap, downcast.

TV gif. Desus Nice from Desus & Mero looks at his watch on his wrist, rolls his eyes, and slides down in his seat in frustration.
Celebrity gif. We see Tiffany Pollard in a closeup looking bored or angry. We back up to see she sits in bed dressed to go out with boots and sunglasses on, her hands folded in her lap.
